channel.title: Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart on Validated Patterns

item.title: Getting started
item.description: Deploying the Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart pattern Prerequisites An OpenShift cluster (version 4.18 or later). This pattern requires at least 1 NVIDIA GPU node for LLM inference.

item.title: Customizing this pattern
item.description: Customizing the Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart pattern This pattern deploys an AI chatbot with a multi-layered guardrails pipeline that includes model-based detectors, a rule-based language detector, and regular expression-based competitor filtering.

item.title: Cluster sizing
item.description: Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart pattern hub/datacenter cluster size The Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart pattern has been tested with a defined set of specifically tested configurations that represent the most common combinations that Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform customers are using or deploying for the x86_64 architecture.

item.title: Troubleshooting
item.description: Troubleshooting the Lemonade Stand AI Quickstart pattern Prerequisite and tooling issues Podman version not supported The pattern.sh script requires Podman 4.
